org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.view

Interface ViewComponentContainer<C extends ViewComponent,G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>>

  • Type Parameters:
    C - is the type of the components.
    G - is the type of the graph.
    All Superinterfaces:
    Iterable<C>, Serializable
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    FigureView, JFigureView

    public interface ViewComponentContainer<C extends ViewComponent,G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>>
extends Iterable<C>, Serializable
    Container of view components.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:01
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-fig

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int addFigure(C component)
      Add the element at the specified index.
      Color getBackgroundColor()
      Replies the background color of the panel.
      C getFigureAt(int index)
      Replies the element at the specified index.
      int getFigureCount()
      Replies the number of components in this container.
      FigureFactory<G> getFigureFactory()
      Replies the figure factory used by this panel.
      Color getSelectionBackgroundColor()
      Replies the background color associated to selection.
      Color getSelectionForegroundColor()
      Replies the foreground color associated to selection.
      Object getTreeLock()
      Gets this container's locking object (the object that owns the thread synchronization monitor) for rendering tree and layout operations.
      UUID getUUID()
      Relies the id of the view.
      Rectangle2f getViewBounds()
      Replies the bounds of the view of the components.
      boolean isShadowDrawn()
      Replies if the shadows are drawn.
      void paintViewComponents(ViewGraphics2D g)
      Method to paint the figures.
      void removeAllFigures()
      Clear the components.
      int removeFigure(C component)
      Remove the specified element.
      C removeFigureAt(int index)
      Remove the element at the specified index.
      void setShadowDrawn(boolean draw)
      Set if the shadows are drawn.

      • Methods inherited from interface java.lang.Iterable

        iterator

    • Method Detail

      • getTreeLock

        Object getTreeLock()
        Gets this container's locking object (the object that owns the thread synchronization monitor) for rendering tree and layout operations.
        Returns:
        this component's locking object

      • getUUID

        UUID getUUID()
        Relies the id of the view.
        Returns:
        the id of the view.

      • getViewBounds

        Rectangle2f getViewBounds()
        Replies the bounds of the view of the components.
        Returns:
        the bounds of the view of the components.

      • getFigureCount

        int getFigureCount()
        Replies the number of components in this container.
        Returns:
        the number of components in this container.

      • getFigureAt

        C getFigureAt(int index)
        Replies the element at the specified index.
        Parameters:
        index - is the index of the element.
        Returns:
        the element at the specified index.

      • addFigure

        int addFigure(C component)
        Add the element at the specified index.
        Parameters:
        component - is the component to add.
        Returns:
        the position where the figure is inserted; or -1 if the figure was not added.

      • removeFigure

        int removeFigure(C component)
        Remove the specified element.
        Parameters:
        component - is the component to remove.
        Returns:
        the position of the removed figure.

      • removeFigureAt

        C removeFigureAt(int index)
        Remove the element at the specified index.
        Parameters:
        index - is the position of the element to remove.
        Returns:
        the removed figure.

      • removeAllFigures

        void removeAllFigures()
        Clear the components.

      • paintViewComponents

        void paintViewComponents(ViewGraphics2D g)
        Method to paint the figures.
        Parameters:
        g - the graphic context.

      • getFigureFactory

        FigureFactory<G> getFigureFactory()
        Replies the figure factory used by this panel.
        Returns:
        the figure factory.

      • getSelectionForegroundColor

        Color getSelectionForegroundColor()
        Replies the foreground color associated to selection.
        Returns:
        the foreground selection color

      • getSelectionBackgroundColor

        Color getSelectionBackgroundColor()
        Replies the background color associated to selection.
        Returns:
        the background selection color

      • getBackgroundColor

        Color getBackgroundColor()
        Replies the background color of the panel.
        Returns:
        the background color

      • isShadowDrawn

        boolean isShadowDrawn()
        Replies if the shadows are drawn.
        Returns:
        true if the shadows are drawn; otherwise false.

      • setShadowDrawn

        void setShadowDrawn(boolean draw)
        Set if the shadows are drawn.
        Parameters:
        draw - is true if the shadows are drawn; otherwise false.
